title: TMNT
body:
A texture pack that adds the iconic ninja turtles in place of the sea turtles. As well as add some items from the TMNT franchise!

 

Mobs

- Turtles

(Using Optifine you will have a random chance for either of the four turtles to spawn. Without Optifine, Leonardo is the default texture)

 

Items

Donatello's Staff - Wooden Sword

Michelangelo's Nunchucks - Iron Sword

Raphael's Sai - Diamond Sword

Leonardo's Katana - Netherite Sword

TMNT-themed Turtle Helmet

(Using Optifine you can rename the turtle helmet to either: Michelangelo, Raphael, or Donatello to change the texture. Leonardo is the default)

 
Showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Gk7yBFV9t0
